paragraphs.text: 秋天来了，天气变凉了。树上的叶子变成了黄色和红色，一片一片落下来。
paragraphs.translation: Autumn has come, the weather has turned cool. The leaves on the trees have turned yellow and red, falling one by one.

paragraphs.text: 秋风吹过，树叶在空中跳舞。我和妹妹在落叶堆里跳来跳去，嘎吱嘎吱响。
paragraphs.translation: The autumn wind blows, leaves dance in the air. My sister and I jump around in the leaf piles, crunch crunch.

paragraphs.text: 秋天是丰收的季节。果园里的苹果红了，橘子黄了。农民伯伯们忙着摘水果。
paragraphs.translation: Autumn is the harvest season. The apples in the orchard are red, the oranges are yellow. Farmer uncles are busy picking fruit.
